title: THE QFLOW GAME
subtitle: Navigate the chaos. Try not to lose your mind.

segments.text: Seed round closes. Move ahead 2.
First pilot on a live tier-one site. Move ahead 1.
Roll again.
Materials logged at the gate. Skip the rework queue. Move ahead 3.
Carbon reporting goes live. Move ahead 2.
A national framework signs you on. Move ahead 2.
Lose a turn.
Concrete pour logged in real time. Move ahead 1.
Waste movements reconcile themselves. Move ahead 2.
Miss a go.
Series A oversubscribed. Move ahead 3.
A delivery slips through unlogged. Move back 2.
Site inspections go paperless. Move ahead 2.
Roll again.
An audit trail saves a disputed claim. Move ahead 2.
Compliance gap caught before handover. Move ahead 1.
A tier-one contractor rolls you out estate-wide. Move ahead 3.
Lose a turn.
Environmental data wins a major award. Move ahead 2.
The BIM model integration ships. Move ahead 2.
Series B closes oversubscribed. Move ahead 3.
Roll again.
Rework on site hits a record low. Move ahead 2.
Handover pack built in one click. Move ahead 2.
Defect rate drops below one percent. Move ahead 2.
Miss a go.
A government mandate makes you the standard. Move ahead 3.
The IPO bell rings. The board applauds. Move ahead 2.
